results.title: Manipur: Kuki-Zo body urges govt to remove highway blockades by Naga groups
results.description: In a statement, the Committee on Tribal Unity (CoTU) said that following joint deliberation with all civil society organisations (CSOs) of Kangpokpi, it unanimously resolved to "serve a 48-hour ultimatum", effective from Sunday midnight, for removing all blockades.
